steps.t: The Elf Maengamiel can be found in the Garden of Duillond, watching helplessly over the shrew-ridden field. You should tell Maengamiel about Bodo Burr…
Nibs Cotton is at the Cotton's farm in Bywater, while Wald Sandson is at Sandson's Farm near Michel Delving. The Gaffer Hamfast Gamgee is in Hobbiton,…
Maengamiel is in the Festival Garden in Duillond, watching over the shrew chaos. You should tell Maengamiel what you learned from the three hobbit gar…
